title: Eulex Desk Custom Context Pack
description: Portable, versioned context-pack (YAML) for a Eulex Desk Custom Context. Carries source references and instructions — never fetched legal text.

schema_version.description: Pack schema version. Importers reject an unknown version.

sources.description: Source references only — kind/ref identify the source; content is fetched on import/use, never embedded in the pack.

ref.description: Stable reference: CELEX id (optionally with #article fragment), caselaw identifier, or web URL.

mode.description: pinned = always in context (article-level sources only); retrieved = fetched on demand.
